sentences.arabic: بَاتَ الْوَعْيُ الصِّحِّيُّ يَنْتَشِرُ بِشَكْلٍ مَلْحُوظٍ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، مِمَّا أَدَّى إِلَى تَغْيِيرِ بَعْضِ الْعَادَاتِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Zdravstvena svijest se primjetno širi u arapskim društvima, što je dovelo do promjene nekih prehrambenih navika.
sentences.translationEn: Health awareness has begun to spread noticeably in Arab societies, leading to changes in some dietary habits.

sentences.arabic: يُرَكِّزُ خُبَرَاءُ التَّغْذِيَةِ الْيَوْمَ عَلَى أَهَمِّيَّةِ تَنَاوُلِ الْخُضْرَوَاتِ الْمَوْسِمِيَّةِ وَتَقْلِيلِ اسْتِهْلَاكِ الدُّهُونِ وَالسُّكَّرِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Nutricionisti se danas fokusiraju na važnost konzumiranja sezonskog povrća i smanjenja unosa masti i šećera.
sentences.translationEn: Nutrition experts today focus on the importance of eating seasonal vegetables and reducing the consumption of fats and sugars.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ النِّظَامُ الْغِذَائِيُّ الْمُتَوَازِنُ، الَّذِي يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الْبْرُوتِينَاتِ وَالْأَلْيَافِ، الرَّكِيزَةَ الْأَسَاسِيَّةَ لِلْوِقَايَةِ مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Uravnotežena ishrana, koja kombinuje proteine i vlakna, smatra se osnovnim stubom za prevenciju bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: A balanced diet, which combines proteins and fibers, is the fundamental pillar for preventing diseases.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِشُرْبِ كَمِيَّاتٍ كَافِيَةٍ مِنَ الْمَاءِ وَمُمَارَسَةِ الرِّيَاضَةِ بِانْتِظَامٍ لِضَمَانِ نَشَاطِ الْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari također savjetuju pijenje dovoljne količine vode i redovno vježbanje kako bi se osigurala vitalnost tijela.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors also advise drinking sufficient amounts of water and exercising regularly to ensure body vitality.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاعْتِدَالَ فِي تَنَاوُلِ الطَّعَامِ هُوَ جَوْهَرُ الصِّحَّةِ الْجَيِّدَةِ، وَهُوَ مَا يَتَّفِقُ مَعَ الْقِيَمِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَدْعُو إِلَى التَّوَازُنِ.
sentences.translation: Umjerenost u jelu je suština dobrog zdravlja, što se slaže s kulturnim vrijednostima koje pozivaju na ravnotežu.
sentences.translationEn: Moderation in eating is the essence of good health, which aligns with cultural values that call for balance.
